'''dhobavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulcanologic|vulcanologic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulcanologic|vulcanologic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhobavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobavithi|dhobavithi]] || [[word:dhobaviji|dhobaviji]] || [[word:dhobavishi|dhobavishi]] || [[word:dhobaviki|dhobaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobavuthuthu|dhobavuthuthu]] || [[word:dhobavujuju|dhobavujuju]] || [[word:dhobavushushu|dhobavushushu]] || [[word:dhobavukuku|dhobavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobavuthu|dhobavuthu]] || [[word:dhobavuju|dhobavuju]] || [[word:dhobavushu|dhobavushu]] || [[word:dhobavuku|dhobavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobavufthuf|dhobavufthuf]] || [[word:dhobavufjuf|dhobavufjuf]] || [[word:dhobavufshuf|dhobavufshuf]] || [[word:dhobavufkuf|dhobavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobavethe|dhobavethe]] || [[word:dhobaveje|dhobaveje]] || [[word:dhobaveshe|dhobaveshe]] || [[word:dhobaveke|dhobaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobavothotho|dhobavothotho]] || [[word:dhobavojojo|dhobavojojo]] || [[word:dhobavoshosho|dhobavoshosho]] || [[word:dhobavokoko|dhobavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobavotho|dhobavotho]] || [[word:dhobavojo|dhobavojo]] || [[word:dhobavosho|dhobavosho]] || [[word:dhobavoko|dhobavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobavofthof|dhobavofthof]] || [[word:dhobavofjof|dhobavofjof]] || [[word:dhobavofshof|dhobavofshof]] || [[word:dhobavofkof|dhobavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobavïfthïf|dhobavïfthïf]] || [[word:dhobavïfjïf|dhobavïfjïf]] || [[word:dhobavïfshïf|dhobavïfshïf]] || [[word:dhobavïfkïf|dhobavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobavïfthïfthïf|dhobavïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dhobavïfjïfjïf|dhobavïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dhobavïfshïfshïf|dhobavïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dhobavïfkïfkïf|dhobavïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobavïfthïf|dhobavïfthïf]] || [[word:dhobavïfjïf|dhobavïfjïf]] || [[word:dhobavïfshïf|dhobavïfshïf]] || [[word:dhobavïfkïf|dhobavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobavïfthïf|dhobavïfthïf]] || [[word:dhobavïfjïf|dhobavïfjïf]] || [[word:dhobavïfshïf|dhobavïfshïf]] || [[word:dhobavïfkïf|dhobavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobavæthæ|dhobavæthæ]] || [[word:dhobavæjæ|dhobavæjæ]] || [[word:dhobavæshæ|dhobavæshæ]] || [[word:dhobavækæ|dhobavækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobavathatha|dhobavathatha]] || [[word:dhobavajaja|dhobavajaja]] || [[word:dhobavashasha|dhobavashasha]] || [[word:dhobavakaka|dhobavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobavatha|dhobavatha]] || [[word:dhobavaja|dhobavaja]] || [[word:dhobavasha|dhobavasha]] || [[word:dhobavaka|dhobavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobavafthaf|dhobavafthaf]] || [[word:dhobavafjaf|dhobavafjaf]] || [[word:dhobavafshaf|dhobavafshaf]] || [[word:dhobavafkaf|dhobavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhobavasha|dhobavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhobavshësha|dhobavshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhobavrosha|dhobavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhobavmusha|dhobavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhobavyasha|dhobavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhobavnkshësha|godhobavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhobavnkrosha|godhobavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhobavnkmusha|godhobavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhobavnkyasha|godhobavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhobabavasha|dhobabavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhobabavshësha|dhobabavshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhobabavrosha|dhobabavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhobabavmusha|dhobabavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhobabavyasha|dhobabavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhobabavnkshësha|godhobabavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhobabavnkrosha|godhobabavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhobabavnkmusha|godhobabavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhobabavnkyasha|godhobabavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhebævasha|dhebævasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhebævshësha|dhebævshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhebævrosha|dhebævrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhebævmusha|dhebævmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhebævyasha|dhebævyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhebævnkshësha|godhebævnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhebævnkrosha|godhebævnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhebævnkmusha|godhebævnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhebævnkyasha|godhebævnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhobfavasha|dhobfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhobfavshësha|dhobfavshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhobfavrosha|dhobfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhobfavmusha|dhobfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhobfavyasha|dhobfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhobfavnkshësha|godhobfavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhobfavnkrosha|godhobfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhobfavnkmusha|godhobfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhobfavnkyasha|godhobfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
